canvas.$description: Base info canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-subtle.$description: Subtle info canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.$description: Muted info canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

canvas-inverse.$description: Base inverse info canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.$description: Base info ink color for body text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.$description: Subtle info ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

ink-muted.$description: Muted info ink color for secondary text and icons.

ink-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

ink-inverse.$description: Base inverse info ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

border.$description: Base info border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.$description: Subtle info border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.$description: Muted info border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.$description: Base inverse info border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.
